body:
Closes #2226. This is somewhat of a peel off from #2212.

This PR:
 - initializes masks to true everywhere by default
 - Adds masks to the show method for spaces
 - Extracts the mask from the axes of the broadcasted objects
title: Updates to masked spaces

body: This PR moves the two identical instances of `unionall_type` (and the similarly named `union_all_type`) to a common function in `Utilities`. It also adds examples to clarify what the function does.
title: Move unionall_type to Utilities, add docs

body:
Motivated by some ClimaAtmos RRTMGPInterface code,

```julia
ᶜis_bottom_cloud = Fields.Field(
    DataLayouts.replace_basetype(
        Fields.field_values(ᶜz),
        Bool,
    ),
    ᶜspace,
) # need to fix several ClimaCore bugs in order to simplify this
```

This PR adds support for creating Boolean fields via `Fields.Field(::Bool, ::AbstractSpace)` by specializing on our `Fields.Field(::Type{T}, ::AbstractSpace) where {T}` constructor.
title: Specialize field constructor for boolean fields

body:
<!-- Provide a clear description of the content -->

This PR removes the alias `const ⋅ = MultiplyColumnwiseBandMatrixField()` and allows us to use the standard `*` symbol to denote matrix multiplication. All internal uses of `⋅` have been replaced with `*`, and the exported `⋅` symbol has been replaced with `const ⋅ = *`. This export is necessary to avoid breaking ClimaAtmos for now, but it should be removed before the next major release of ClimaCore. (The `⋅` symbol cannot be marked as deprecated because `@deprecate` only works for function calls.)

This PR supersedes #2229 and closes #1774.

- [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: Use * to denote matrix multiplication
